action: Navigate to /events and verify events list loads with event cards visible
expected: Events list page renders without errors, at least one event card with name and date visible, timestamps in IST, no secrets exposed
actual: Events list page rendered with 7 event cards. Each card shows event name, date range (e.g. 'Oct 10-12, 2026'), venue, and status badge (Draft/Live). Zero console errors. All network requests succeeded (200). No secrets visible. No raw UTC timestamps.
reason: All 9 checks passed. Page loaded successfully after Clerk authentication. 7 events visible under 'Upcoming' section.
console_warnings: Clerk: Clerk has been loaded with development keys.
Clerk: The prop 'afterSignInUrl' is deprecated and should be replaced with 'fallbackRedirectUrl' or 'forceRedirectUrl'.
redaction_reason: Clerk auth/session query parameters removed before commit.
